description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The structure is composed of two main wings separated by a central open area, with large floor-to-ceiling windows dominating the facade and providing ample natural light. The exterior includes multiple balconies and terraces, as well as a landscaped yard with a few trees and shrubs. The ground level appears to have a covered entryway supported by columns, and the overall layout suggests a spacious, open-plan interior. The house is set on a rectangular plot with a paved area in front, likely for parking or a driveway. The minimalist aesthetic is emphasized by the uniform, light-colored exterior and the geometric arrangement of windows and doors.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, multiple balconies, and a landscaped yard, featuring a minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house's two main wings, central open area, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, large windows, and symmetrical facade with balconies.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear balconies, window arrangements, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the back terraces, flat roof, and the geometric window layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large floor-to-ceiling windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a covered porch, supported by columns, and large glass doors
